headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Says 'Mark It Up' After Reported Compromise On Clarity Act's Stablecoin Yields Clause
summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong backed advancing the CLARITY Act after a compromise on stablecoin yields removed a major obstacle.

headline: Why ResMed (RMD) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Reassess Growth And Valuation Assumptions
summary: ResMed’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from US$296.53 to US$288.21, a reduction of about 2.8% that signals a more cautious stance on what analysts are willing to pay for the shares. This shift lines up with recent research where some firms have cut price targets by US$5 to US$45, while others still see room to build exposure based on their own assumptions. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these mixed signals and keep track of how the story around ResMed is...

headline: How The Grupo Supervielle (BASE:SUPV) Investment Story Is Evolving With Cautious Analyst Targets
summary: Grupo Supervielle’s latest analyst update keeps the core Fair Value target at ARS3,351.5, while one of the higher profile calls from JPMorgan trims its international price target to US$11 from US$12. That adjustment, along with a Neutral rating, reinforces the current tone of risk calibration rather than a clear bullish or bearish message. headline: How The Story Is Shifting For Customers Bancorp (CUBI) As Views On Growth And Risks Split
summary: Customers Bancorp’s refreshed fair value estimate now sits at US$90.00, up from US$88.73, and comes alongside Street price targets that span from US$71.00 to US$92.00. This tighter cluster reflects a tug of war between analysts who see more upside in the commercial banking story and those who are increasingly focused on funding mix, crypto related exposure, and competitive risks. Read on to see how to track these shifting views and what to watch as the narrative evolves. Analyst Price Targets...
